expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves donut-label assumptions for label visibility, density limits, and overlap-sensitive presentation
expectations.evidence: The output explicitly covers the required case focus in the Phase 1 intake checklist: it enumerates "Label visibility", "Density limits", and "Overlap-sensitive presentation" with specific sub-bullets (e.g., "Minimum slice size threshold", "Maximum number of slices", "handling overlapping labels (avoidance, leader lines, collision detection)"). It also states the benchmark focus verbatim: "Focus: context intake preserves donut-label assumptions for label visibility, density limits, and overlap-sensitive presentation."

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: The result is clearly scoped to Phase 1: title "QA Plan Orchestrator — Phase 1 (Context Intake)", it labels "Primary phase under test: phase1", includes "Phase 1 Contract Check" and "Phase 1 Output Alignment", and explicitly states "No downstream planning/test design (phase2+) is included."
